description: LinkedIn Sales Navigator is a B2B prospecting tool with advanced search filters, real-time alerts, and CRM sync.
tagline: Sales prospecting and insights on LinkedIn
overview: LinkedIn Sales Navigator helps sellers find and connect with the right buyers using advanced search with 50+ filters, real-time alerts, and deep CRM integrations.
what_is: LinkedIn Sales Navigator is a B2B sales tool that helps sellers find and connect with the right buyers. Its AI-powered search offers more than 50 filters and real-time alerts, helping reps surface high-quality leads and build relationships to close deals faster.

It is strongest for building pipeline, engaging decision-makers, and personalizing outreach, and it syncs with CRMs like Salesforce and HubSpot with automated lead and contact creation. Sales Navigator is a lead discovery and relationship platform rather than a marketing automation tool or CRM itself.
